---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Use case
What are you trying to accomplish? Why is the current behavior insufficient?

## Proposed solution
What would you like to see happen?

## Alternatives considered
Other ways to solve this problem.

## Philosophy check
Please confirm your proposal is compatible with TypeLess's core constraints (see `CONTRIBUTING.md`):
- [ ] No new npm/CDN dependencies
- [ ] No build step / transpilation
- [ ] Works in both Chromium 88+ and Firefox 140+
- [ ] No external network calls or telemetry

## Additional context
Mockups, examples from other tools, anything else.
